summary: Delta v3 regression: void moved to any-authenticated-user, new /entry/bills page, ThemeDatePicker replacing native inputs across 5 pages, and 3 CSV export buttons. Backend: 6/6 pytest passed (employee can void, owner can void, unauth rejected, double-void 400, employee lists bills, inventory restored on void). Frontend: all data-testids present on all delta pages, void button GONE from owner DBilling (0 found), confirm-void modal works, shadcn calendar popover opens on 3 pickers, CSV download wiring verified (dejabrew-overview-2026-04-21_to_2026-04-21.csv downloaded). Native <input type='date'> removed from /entry/bills, /entry/walkins, /entry/purchases, /dashboard/billing. Smoke on previously-passing flows: login, role-based redirect, sidebar nav, data lists all green.
critical_code_review_comments: Bills.jsx: voidReason state is captured but never sent to POST /api/bills/{id}/void — reason is discarded. Either drop the input or extend backend to persist void_reason.

billing_router.void_bill: no authorization restriction at all now — any authenticated role (including future 'guest' if added) can void any bill. Consider audit-log field voided_by is captured which partly mitigates this.
ThemeDatePicker uses Popover without an explicit z-index — confirmed working over current modals, but stacked popovers inside a modal (future usage) may need z-[60] override.
Overview/DSales/DBilling CSV export runs client-side via toolbar tab/date state; no backend endpoint — works but large ranges could exceed browser memory. Not a blocker for MVP.
seed_data_creation: Created ~4 bills (2 voided) via backend pytest using TEST_-prefixed customer names. Idempotent; no cleanup required.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Correct preview URL is https://deja-brew-erp.preview.emergentagent.com (hyphenated — NOT dejabrew-erp). Always read /app/frontend/.env REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL first. Delta tests live in test_delta_v3.py; prior 35 tests in test_deja_brew_v2.py. Employee and owner users persist across runs. CSV download uses browser blob — use page.expect_download() in Playwright to verify.
rca_of_the_issue: No bugs found in delta. Initial Playwright failures were due to typo in preview hostname (dejabrew-erp vs deja-brew-erp). Resolved by reading REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from frontend/.env.
